definition.name: def-injective-cochain-norm
definition.definition: For a k-linear Jordan cochain theta, the injective (order-unit) cochain norm is ||theta||_inj = sup over ||x_1||<=1,...,||x_k||<=1 of ||theta(x_1,...,x_k)||, all norms being the order-unit norm of the algebra. It is distinct from the Frobenius/Hilbert-Schmidt tensor norm.
